headline: How CSX’s (CSX) New US$5 Billion Buyback and Tech Leadership Shift Will Impact Investors
summary: CSX Corporation recently approved a US$0.14 per-share quarterly dividend payable on June 15, 2026, and authorized a new US$5.00 billion share repurchase program, while also announcing the departure of Executive Vice President and Chief Digital & Technology Officer Stephen Fortune, whose responsibilities have been assumed by Steve Watkins. This combination of a sizable buyback authorization and a leadership shift in digital and technology underscores CSX’s emphasis on capital returns while...
